channel.title: vpn on Whatever Blog
channel.description: Recent content in vpn on Whatever Blog

item.title: Docker搭建wireguard回家
item.description:
docker cli 安装 wireguard

docker run -d \
  --name=wireguard \
  --cap-add=NET_ADMIN \
  --cap-add=SYS_MODULE \
  -e PUID=1000 \
  -e PGID=1000 \
  -e TZ=Asia/Shanghai \
  -e SERVERURL=your.domain \
  -e SERVERPORT=31821 \
  -e PEERS=1 \
  -e PEERDNS=auto \
  -e INTERNAL_SUBNET=192.168.10.0 \
  -p 31821:51820/udp \
  -v /home/aki/wg/config:/config \
  -v /lib/modules:/lib/modules \
  --sysctl="net.ipv4.conf.all.src_valid_mark=1" \
   --restart unless-stopped \
  linuxserver/wireguard

通过环境变量PEERS来生成需要的对端数量
